name: ficobridge
description: FicoBridge - Plateforme intelligente de suivi de recherche d'alternance

scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/api && npx prisma db seed
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed

author: FicoBridge Team
